data.title: LBank has launched SANTA and PAYAI
data.description: According to official news, LBank will launch SANTA by Virtuals (SANTA) and PayAI Network (PAYAI) on October 24, 2025, at 3:50 PM (SGT). Trading pairs for SANTA/USDT and PAYAI/USDT will also be available. Deposits are now open, and withdrawals will be available at 4:00 PM (SGT) on October 25.

data.title: Jupiter will launch a new ICO platform in November, with the first token issuance scheduled for mid-month.
data.description: In an interview with The Rollup, Jupiter co-founder Cash stated that the team is preparing to launch a new ICO platform, expected to launch in November 2025. The platform, whose name has not yet been announced, aims to provide issuance support for projects and provide more profit opportunities for JUP holders. Cash stated that the first token issuance is scheduled to begin in mid-November.

data.title: Australian rare earth miners are making bank after US backed supply chain rivals to China

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/australian-rare-earth-miners-are-making-bank/

data.title: Trader Opens New Bitcoin and Ethereum Positions with Significant Holdings
data.description: According to Foresight News, a trader with a reported 100% success rate has recently opened a new long position in Bitcoin (BTC). The trader currently holds 80.3 BTC, valued at $8.9 million, with an entry price of $110,900 per Bitcoin. Additionally, the trader has a long position in Ethereum (ETH), holding 33,270.78 ETH, valued at $132 million, with an entry price of $3,897.59 per Ethereum.

data.title: Trump’s CZ pardon draws fury from Maxine Waters over ‘pay-to-play’ crypto ties
data.description:
Representative Maxine Waters slammed President Donald Trump’s pardon of Binance co-founder Changpeng Zhao, calling it a corrupt favor to a “crypto criminal. ”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trump-accused-of-rewarding-crypto-criminals-after-pardoning-binance-s-cz?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_rnd%3Ddnw8z7%26r%3Ddnw8z7&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance Completes Hemi (HEMI) Integration on HEMI Network
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has successfully integrated Hemi (HEMI) on the HEMI network, marking a significant development for users interested in this digital asset. As of now, deposits for HEMI are open, allowing users to engage with the token on the Binance platform. This integration is expected to enhance the accessibility and functionality of HEMI within the Binance ecosystem.

Binance has indicated that withdrawals for HEMI will be enabled once there are sufficient deposits on the network. Users are advised to monitor the platform for updates regarding the availability of withdrawals, as no further announcements will be made on this matter. This streamlined approach aims to ensure a smooth transition for users looking to manage their HEMI assets effectively. The integration of HEMI is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to expand its offerings and provide users with diverse options for digital asset management.

data.title: Australia Leads in Global Cryptocurrency Interest, Data Shows
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Australians exhibit the highest interest in cryptocurrency per capita, primarily driven by trading and speculation activities. This insight comes from data compiled by Andreessen Horowitz's crypto division, which analyzed web traffic related to the top 30 tokens on CoinGecko, excluding Bitcoin and stablecoins. The findings reveal that Australians lead with 74.63% of token-related web traffic per 1 billion people. South Koreans follow closely with 73.48%, while the United Kingdom ranks third with 62.15% per 1 billion people.

In contrast, the United States shows a lower engagement, with only 40.73% of web traffic directed towards token-related activities per 1 billion people. The report highlights a trend where crypto users from developed countries, such as Australia, are more inclined towards trading and speculation. Meanwhile, users from developing nations tend to engage more in on-chain activities, as indicated by mobile wallet usage.

Looking ahead, Australia's cryptocurrency market is projected to expand significantly. Statista forecasts an annual growth rate of 19.85%, with total revenue expected to reach 1.2 billion Australian dollars ($780 million) by 2026. The Australian crypto user base is anticipated to grow to 11.16 million by 2026, with nearly 41% of Australians participating in cryptocurrency activities.

A survey by Swyftx reveals that 40% of Gen Z and Millennial Australians regret not investing in cryptocurrencies a decade ago. A Swyftx spokesperson noted that younger investors are drawn to high beta assets and generally possess a good understanding of the asset class. This growing interest among younger demographics suggests a robust future for cryptocurrency adoption in Australia.

data.title: BlockFocus holds 5.9572 million ORDERs, with a floating profit of approximately US$595,000
data.description: According to monitoring by crypto analyst Aunt Ai @ai_9684xtpa, BlockFocus currently holds a total of 5.9572 million ORDERs, with an average purchase price of approximately US$0.2 and a book profit of approximately US$595,000.

data.title: Hyperliquid Leads DEX Surge as Perp Trading Volume Tops $1 Trillion in Record-Breaking October
data.description:
Decentralized perpetual trading volume surpassed $1 trillion in October, setting a new monthly record, with Hyperliquid leading the surge.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/hyperliquid-leads-dex-surge-as-perp-trading-volume-tops-1t/

data.title: Canada slashes 50% on Stellantis’ tariff-free import quota
data.description:
Canada slashes tariff-free import quotas for Stellantis by 50% and General Motors by 24. 2%, citing withdrawal of Ontario manufacturing plans.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/canada-slashes-50-on-stellantis-tariff/

data.title: Crypto community outraged as Melania coin insider bags MET airdrop
data.description:
Crypto analysts raised new concerns after two wallets connected to the Melania Trump meme coin received $1. 23 million in Meteora tokens on Thursday.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/melania-coin-insider-bags-met-airdrop/

data.title: A whale deposited $1.98 million into Hyperliquid and opened a 20x ETH short position.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale address 0x8c58 deposited $1.98 million USDC into Hyperliquid and opened a 20x leveraged ETH short position. This address had previously suffered a cumulative loss of approximately $19 million from multiple ETH short positions, with a historical maximum drawdown of $26.6 million.

data.title: Perpetual DEX Trading Volume Surpasses $1 Trillion in October
data.description: According to PANews, data from DefiLlama reveals that the total trading volume on decentralized exchanges (Perp DEX) focusing on perpetual contracts exceeded $1 trillion in October. This marks a significant increase from September's $739 billion, setting a new record for the highest monthly trading volume.

data.title: 21Shares Launches Pendle ETP on Swiss Exchange
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, 21Shares has introduced a new exchange-traded product (ETP) for Pendle on the SIX Swiss Exchange, under the ticker APEN. This development provides European investors with a regulated avenue to invest in $PENDLE.

The launch marks a significant milestone for Pendle, enhancing its institutional recognition. It also highlights the growing integration of leading decentralized finance (DeFi) assets into traditional financial (TradFi) infrastructure.
